description_long: This modern bungalow is surrounded by a tall, manicured hedge, providing privacy and a defined boundary. The structure features a mix of stone and glass facades, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool, a paved patio area with outdoor seating, and a small garden with neatly trimmed bushes and trees. The roof is predominantly flat with a slight pitch, and there is a covered outdoor lounge area adjacent to the main building. The entrance is marked by a pathway leading through the hedge, and the overall landscaping is geometric and well-maintained. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, stone-and-glass bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and manicured hedges enclosing a geometric garden and patio.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large glass windows, and a pathway through the hedge with trimmed bushes lining the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the pool, outdoor lounge area, and the extensive hedge boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the pool, patio seating, and tall trees along the back wall, with the covered lounge area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the secondary entrance, more glass facade, and the hedge-enclosed garden with outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
